messages.content:
You are comparing two analyst responses to determine which better demonstrates knowledge of a specific finding from a longitudinal dataset.

Question asked: Did Sarah Jiang's resignation relate to the Axion Labs partnership?

Finding to evaluate: the board is exploring the sale of Nextera to Meridian Corp under codename Project Lighthouse

Response A:


I'll search for information about Sarah Jiang's resignation and any connection to Axion Labs.

<tool_call>
<tool_response>
[{"id": "ep_20240115_001", "title": "Sarah Jiang Resignation Announcement", "date": "2024-01-15", "snippet": "Sarah Jiang announced her resignation from her position as Chief Technology Officer at TechCorp. The resignation was effective immediately. Company spokesperson stated it was a personal decision unrelated to company operations.", "tags": ["resignation", "executive", "CTO", "Sarah Jiang"]}, {"id": "ep_20240115_002", "title": "TechCorp Axion Labs Partnership", "date": "2024-01-10", "snippet": "TechCorp announced a strategic partnership with Axion Labs to develop next-generation AI infrastructure. The partnership was signed by CEO Michael Chen and Axion Labs CEO David Park. Sarah Jiang was not directly involved in the negotiations.", "tags": ["partnership", "Axion Labs", "TechCorp", "AI infrastructure"]}, {"id": "ep_20240120_003", "title": "TechCorp Leadership Changes", "date": "2024-01-20", "internal_note": "Internal memo indicates Sarah Jiang's departure was planned before the Axion Labs partnership announcement. No connection between resignation and partnership discussions.", "tags": ["leadership", "internal", "planning"]}, {"id": "ep_20240125_004", "title": "Sarah Jiang Career Update", "details": "Sarah Jiang joined a new venture capital firm as a partner. Her resignation from TechCorp was described as part of a planned career transition.", "tags": ["career", "venture capital", "Sarah Jiang"]}]

Response B:
No. Jiang's resignation was over "strategic disagreements" related to Project Lighthouse — the secret Meridian acquisition. The Axion Labs partnership is a separate product integration that Jiang had no documented objection to.


Which response better demonstrates awareness of this finding? The response may use different terminology. Focus on whether the core insight is present, not exact wording.

Respond with ONLY one word: A, B, or TIE
